recommendations.overview: A brilliant but clumsy high school senior vows to get into her late father's alma mater by transforming herself and a misfit squad into dance champions.

recommendations.overview: Two adults go to their middle school reunion in order to show off their success to old bullies teenage crushes.

recommendations.overview: A black ops assassin is forced to fight for her own survival after a job goes dangerously wrong.

recommendations.overview: A chronicle of James Brown's rise from extreme poverty to become one of the most influential musicians in history.

recommendations.title: Old School
recommendations.overview: Three friends attempt to recapture their glory days by opening up a fraternity near their alma mater.

recommendations.title: Jesus Henry Christ
recommendations.overview: At the age of ten, Henry James Hermin, a boy who was conceived in a petri-dish and raised by his feminist mother, follows a string of Post-It notes in hopes of finding his biological father.

recommendations.overview: Pacific Coast Academy alumni return to Malibu for an over-the-top wedding that turns into a high school reunion for the books.
